title: clerodendrum urticifolium
intro: Clerodendrum urticifolium, also known as the netted clerodendrum, is a tropical plant species native to the tropical regions of Asia and the Pacific Islands. It is a climbing vine with leaves that resemble those of the stinging nettle, hence its common name. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help to treat wounds and infections. The netted clerodendrum can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and its health benefits include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system.
